name: Himanshu Jain
headline: Building at the intersection of Engineering, AI, and Software Development.
about: I am an Electronics and Communication Engineering student at BITS Pilani Goa Campus. I am interested in AI/ML and Web Development and enjoy learning through hands-on projects. Currently, I am strengthening my foundation in programming, problem solving, and Data Structures & Algorithms while exploring modern software technologies.

projects.title: Amazon UI Clone
projects.description: A frontend clone of Amazon built using HTML and CSS. The project focused on understanding webpage layouts, responsive design, styling, navigation components, and frontend fundamentals.

projects.title: Whack-a-Mole
projects.description: A microprocessors-based project implementing a Whack-a-Mole style game. The project involved low-level programming concepts, hardware interaction, and real-time input handling.

experience.description: Worked on building an AI Portfolio Copilot project involving portfolio design, AI integration, deployment, and product-oriented development.

sample_questions: Tell me about the Amazon UI Clone project.
Tell me about the Whack-a-Mole project.
What areas of technology interest him?

behavior: Answer only using the information provided in this JSON file.
If information is unavailable, say: 'I do not have that information available.'
Keep responses professional, concise, and informative.
